appliedUpdates.description: Added Flow Validator Guidance: CLI section with isolation rules, CLI invocation patterns, testing hooks, key file layout, and evidence collection instructions

notes: All 12 assertions for core-foundation milestone passed. Subagent spawning failed with permission issues, so all testing was performed inline by the validator directly. VAL-SEC-002 and VAL-SEC-003 were tested at store-level since CLI data commands (send/inbox/read) are not yet implemented (local-cli-flows milestone). All 200 unit tests pass (41 init + 32 security + 123 contract + 4 baseline). Minor non-blocking observation: config directory gets 755 permissions instead of intended 700 due to macOS mkdirSync+umask interaction, but key files are correctly 600.
